t_ch: 原来你还在看着我？
t_en: You are still watching me?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「是啊，是啊，就当是新手福利吧。等你熟悉了『模拟宇宙』，我就不会再频繁打扰你啦，还有那么多事情要干呢，你就自己玩吧。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Yup, sure am. Just treat it as the perk of being a rookie. Once you're familiar with the Simulated Universe, I won't bother you too much. There's so much to get done, so just play around by yourself."</color>

t_ch: 到底哪里升级了啦？
t_en: Just what did you upgrade?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「你以为升级是什么，电子游戏的版本更新吗？每一个半月给你点无足轻重的小玩意儿？」</color>黑塔啧了一声，<color=#dbc291ff>「这可是一整个微型宇宙！如果所有变化你都能一眼看见，我们还费劲培育宇宙干什么，给你家列车盖个花园不就行了？」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"What do you think an upgrade is? The next version of a video game? Some tiny rewards handed out every one-and-half-months?"</color> Herta snorts. <color=#dbc291ff>"This is a whole micro-universe! If you could see all the changes at a glance, why would we spend all the time training a universe? I can just build a garden for your Express instead!"</color>

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: 黑塔叹了口气：<color=#dbc291ff>「再往前走一点有个下载装置，记得用它扩充队伍。你的大脑正在逐渐适应『模拟宇宙』，可用的内存会慢慢释放给你，这样就可以让更多的人参战。好了，别愣着啦，去选祝福吧。」</color>
t_en: Herta sighs. <color=#dbc291ff>"There's a Downloader just a little further ahead. Remember to use it to expand your team. Your brain is gradually adapting to the Simulated Universe, and the available RAM will gradually become accessible for you so you can play with more people. Alright, snap out of it. Go and choose your Blessing."</color>

t_ch: 结束。
t_en: Finish.

t_ch: 「记忆」的祝福体现在冰冻上，它能强化冰冻的效果和收益。
t_en: The Blessings of Remembrance are embodied in Ice, enhancing Freeze effects and buffs.

t_ch: 那个就是下载终端，去试试。
t_en: That's the download terminal. Go give it a try.

t_ch: 瞧，左边是你大脑里的虚拟朋友，右边是已经下载进入系统缓存的队友。
t_en: Look, on the left are the virtual friends in your brain, and on the right are teammates already downloaded into the system cache.

t_ch: 先带上我，把队伍凑足四个人，也能最大限度地发挥「记忆」祝福的作用。
t_en: Take me with you so you can get four people in the team. This also maximizes the effects of the Remembrance Blessing.

t_ch: 为了延长流程，系统加入了「区域」这个概念。现在穿过传送门，我们去下一个区域。
t_en: To extend the session, the system created a concept of "domains." Go through the teleporter into the next zone.

t_ch: 「欢愉」的祝福喜欢出其不意，适合能进行追击的角色。
t_en: Blessings of Elation likes to surprise people, and is useful for characters with Follow-Up ATKs.

t_ch: 斯蒂芬给场地里加了点东西。他说：翻箱倒柜和打砸破坏是游戏必不可少的两种体验。
t_en: Stephen added something to the stage. He said ransacking and smashing things are two essential experiences in games.

t_ch: 一个又一个敌人倒在你的面前，天啊，你简直无人能挡！就像神话传说里的英雄那样英姿伟岸！你挥舞棍棒，打倒一只不自量力胆敢挑战你的野兽，不禁放声大笑。畅快的欢愉令你忘乎所以——慢着，到底发生了什么？
t_en: One enemy after another falls before you. Oh my, you are unstoppable! Just like the heroes of myth and legend! You can't help but laugh as you swing your baseball bat and take down a beast that dares to challenge you. You are getting carried away by the bliss — wait, what the heck just happened?

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「糟糕，祂来了……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Uh oh, THEY're here..."</color>

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「阿基维利，阿基维利！」</color>一个愉悦的声音笑道，<color=#dbc291ff>「真的是你？还是某个小小生灵在和我开致命玩笑呢——好啦，我很想张开双臂欢迎你，可是我没有手臂！毕竟我只是个被囚禁在计算机里的虚假神灵！」</color>祂的说话有种神奇的魔力，令你情不自禁地感到放松。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Akivili! Akivili!"</color> A cheerful voice laughs. <color=#dbc291ff>"Is that really you? Or is some tiny being playing a fatal joke on me — well, I'd love to welcome you with open arms, but I don't have any arms! I'm just a false god imprisoned within a simulation, after all!"</color> There's something magical about THEIR words that causes you to completely relax.

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「这个混账又知道了，我得让螺丝咕姆再改改祂的数据…」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"This punk has figured it out again. I have to get Screwllum to edit THEIR data once more..."</color>

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「问你个问题，伙计：假货什么时候能成为真的？」</color>——你仿佛看见（其实你看不见）声音冲你眨了眨眼睛——<color=#dbc291ff>「答案是你信以为真的时候！加油啊，天才们，你们差一点就唬过我了！没事，我会把一切都忘掉，等你来耍我！再见，*阿基维利*。」</color>
t_en: "A question for you, my friend. When can a fake become the real thing?" — You seem to see (but actually don't) them wink at you — "The answer is... When you believe it to be real! Come on, geniuses. You almost fooled me for a second there! It's okay. I'll forget everything and wait for you to trick me again! So long, Akivili."

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「那是『欢愉』阿哈。」</color>黑塔没好气地解释道，<color=#dbc291ff>「非常难捉摸的星神，祂大概发现自己是假的了。不过，我想祂也不会在乎。这家伙很聒噪，捏着鼻子和祂聊几句吧。辛苦你了。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"That's Aha the Elation,"</color> Herta explains sullenly. <color=#dbc291ff>"A very elusive Aeon who probably figured out that THEY are a simulation. But I don't think THEY even mind it. THEY are very chatty. Just pinch your nose and have a chat with THEM. Thanks in advance."</color>

t_ch: 结束。
t_en: Finish.

t_ch: 战胜这个家伙吧，让我们结束这趟旅程。
t_en: Beat this entity, and let's end this trip for now.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「干得不错，今天就到这儿吧。我和几位合伙人商量了一下，决定加大投入。等你下次来的时候，会看到一个更完善的『模拟宇宙』。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Great job. That's it for today. I've chatted with a few of my collaborators, and we've decided to re-double our efforts. Next time you come back, you'll see an even more perfected Simulated Universe."</color>

t_ch: 你什么时候商量的？
t_en: When did you chat with them?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「在你测试的时候。」</color>黑塔回答，<color=#dbc291ff>「我们有些比公司和博识学会厉害得多的通讯手段，而且，就我们这个智商的人群来说，交流效率很高。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"While you were testing,"</color> Herta replies. <color=#dbc291ff>"We have methods of communication far more powerful than those possessed by the IPC or the Intelligentsia Guild. As far as people with our IQ are concerned, this communication is highly efficient."</color>

t_ch: 你们又想整什么活？
t_en: What tricks are you trying to pull this time?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「大概会来个翻天覆地的大升级吧。」</color>黑塔回答，<color=#dbc291ff>「螺丝咕姆和阮•梅没什么想法，但斯蒂芬兴奋极了，我估计他以为我们是真心想做个游戏。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Pretty much a complete overhaul of an upgrade,"</color> Herta replies. <color=#dbc291ff>"Screwllum and Ruan Mei didn't think much about it, but Stephen is thrilled to pieces. I bet he thinks we're really developing a game here."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「斯蒂芬•劳艾德提了一堆把『模拟宇宙』做有趣的点子，对于钓星神这件事毫无帮助，不过也许能让你玩得更开心点。」</color>黑塔叹气，<color=#dbc291ff>「就这样吧，我也得想想有没有更方便的觐见星神的法子。升级完成后我会通知你的。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Stephen Lloyd has come up with a bunch of different ideas for making the Simulated Universe more fun. It won't help us attract more Aeons, but it might just make you have more fun."</color> Herta sighs. <color=#dbc291ff>"That's it then. I have to think whether there's an easier way to have an audience with an Aeon. I'll buzz you once the upgrade's complete."</color>

t_ch: 退出。
t_en: Exit.

t_ch: 「模拟宇宙」要关闭一阵子了，我们想给系统来一次大升级，顺便看看虚拟阿哈这事怎么处理。
t_en: The Simulated Universe will be closed for a while. We want to give the whole thing a big overhaul, and think about what to do with the simulated Aha.

t_ch: 太遗憾了，我刚上瘾。
t_en: What a shame! I was just getting addicted.

t_ch: 按照斯蒂芬的说法：以后的版本你会更「上瘾」，信不信由你。
t_en: According to Stephen, you'll be even more addicted in future versions, believe it or not.

t_ch: 那家伙的热情也太不寻常了……
t_en: That guy's enthusiasm is just unreal...

t_ch: 没事，我也不感兴趣。
t_en: It's okay. I'm not interested either.

t_ch: 谢谢你的诚实。
t_en: Thanks for your honesty.

t_ch: 阿哈到底是怎么回事？
t_en: What is up with Aha?

t_ch: 「欢愉」是个很奇怪的星神，祂混乱又清醒，同时不像别的星神那样固执。阿哈不会停留在单一的概念里，或许祂看破了「模拟宇宙」的本质。
t_en: Elation is a very strange Aeon. THEY are both confused and clear-minded, and not as stubborn as the other Aeons. Aha won't stay confined to a single concept. THEY may have seen right through the nature of the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: 你可以走了，准备完成后我会发信息给你的。
t_en: You can go. I'll message you when I'm ready.

t_ch: 等等，我还有问题。
t_en: Hang on. I still have questions.

t_ch: 什么问题？
t_en: Yes?

t_ch: 里面的星神真的是虚拟的吗？
t_en: Are the Aeons in there really simulations?

t_ch: 哼哼，你也觉得祂们很厉害吧？虚拟星神和人工智能可不一样。我和阮•梅想到了个办法，把虚拟星神和现实的命途连接到了一起。
t_en: Ha, do you find THEM awe-inspiring, too? A virtual Aeon is not the same as any old AI. Ruan Mei and I came up with a way to connect virtual Aeons with THEIR real Paths.

t_ch: 「模拟宇宙」里的星神相当于一个终端，祂的神格和智慧都来自于真实存在的星神。要不然，我们拿到的情报还有什么价值呢？
t_en: Aeons in the Simulated Universe are the equivalent of a terminal, and THEIR divinity and wisdom come from the real Aeon. Otherwise, what would be the value in any information we get?

t_ch: 你们打算怎么处理阿哈？
t_en: Have you decided on what to do with Aha?

t_ch: 我和螺丝咕姆有个初步共识：首先，他会想办法削减虚拟阿哈的倾向性，甚至屏蔽祂的自我认知部分，但那有些危险，没准会引来真正的「欢愉」……
t_en: I have a basic consensus with Screwllum. First, he'll try reducing the partiality values of the simulated Aha, even going as far as blocking THEIR Intra-Cognition — but that's a little dangerous and may attract the real Elation...

t_ch: 如果我们评估下来不可行，大概会放任这个阿哈随便玩耍，隔绝掉祂和其它虚拟星神的交流吧。
t_en: If we feel that method is unfeasible, then we'll probably leave this Aha to play however THEY like, while isolating THEM from communicating with the other simulated Aeons.

t_ch: 你常挂在嘴边的斯蒂芬是谁？
t_en: Who's this Stephen you keep going on about?

t_ch: 唔，他是我们的第四个合伙人，#84「怪人」斯蒂芬•劳艾德。作为一个天才，这家伙对发挥才能毫无兴趣，每天2/3的时间花在他养父的水果店里。
t_en: Oh, he's our fourth partner, member #84, Stephen "Weirdo" Lloyd. That guy's a genius with no interest in using his abilities, and spends two-thirds of his time in his adoptive father's fruit shop.

t_ch: 对「模拟宇宙」这么酷的项目，他也提不起劲儿。斯蒂芬帮了我们一点忙，他本人要求匿名，不想大张旗鼓，可能有些天才就是不愿意成为天才吧。
t_en: He can't even get himself excited about something as cool as the Simulated Universe. Stephen did us a favor and asked to remain anonymous — he doesn't want to make a big splash at all. Perhaps some geniuses wish they weren't one.

t_ch: 算了，没事。
t_en: Forget it, it's nothing.

t_ch: 下次你最好求我回来。
t_en: You better beg me to come back next time.

t_ch: 有求于你的话，我会的。
t_en: If I have to, then I will.

t_ch: 好吧，再见黑塔。
t_en: Alright. Goodbye, Herta.

t_ch: 我给「模拟宇宙」做了一次预升级，不过还得等等再启用，你到哪儿去了？我一直在等你的测试报告——现在快进去！
t_en: I did a pre-upgrade for the Simulated Universe, but you'll have to wait until I can deploy it. Where have you been? I've been waiting for your test report — get in there, now!

t_ch: 我没想到阿哈会出现…看来得启用升级版本了。
t_en: I never thought Aha would show up... Looks like I'll have to deploy the upgrade version.

t_ch: 太遗憾了，我刚上瘾。
t_en: What a shame! I was just getting addicted.

t_ch: 喔，没事，更新用不了几秒钟。斯蒂芬特别热情，内容早就做好了。
t_en: Oh, that's alright. The update only takes a few seconds. Stephen is particularly enthusiastic, and the content's all ready to go.

t_ch: 没事，我也不感兴趣。
t_en: It's okay. I'm not interested either.

t_ch: 谢谢你的诚实。
t_en: Thanks for your honesty.

t_ch: 阿哈到底是怎么回事？
t_en: What is up with Aha?

t_ch: 「欢愉」是个很奇怪的星神，祂混乱又清醒，同时不像别的星神那样固执。阿哈不会停留在单一的概念里，或许祂看破了「模拟宇宙」的本质。
t_en: Elation is a very strange Aeon. THEY are both confused and clear-minded, and not as stubborn as the other Aeons. Aha won't stay confined to a single concept. THEY may have seen right through the nature of the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: 你很快就可以再进入「模拟宇宙」，新的版本变化还挺多的。
t_en: You'll be able to re-enter the Simulated Universe soon. The update has quite a lot of changes.

t_ch: 等等，我还有问题。
t_en: Hang on. I still have questions.

t_ch: 什么问题？
t_en: Yes?

t_ch: 里面的星神真的是虚拟的吗？
t_en: Are the Aeons in there really simulations?

t_ch: 哼哼，你也觉得祂们很厉害吧？虚拟星神和人工智能可不一样。我和阮•梅想到了个办法，把虚拟星神和现实的命途连接到了一起。
t_en: Ha, do you find THEM awe-inspiring, too? A virtual Aeon is not the same as any old AI. Ruan Mei and I came up with a way to connect virtual Aeons with THEIR real Paths.

t_ch: 「模拟宇宙」里的星神相当于一个终端，祂的神格和智慧都来自于真实存在的星神。要不然，我们拿到的情报还有什么价值呢？
t_en: Aeons in the Simulated Universe are the equivalent of a terminal, and THEIR divinity and wisdom come from the real Aeon. Otherwise, what would be the value in any information we get?

t_ch: 你们打算怎么处理阿哈？
t_en: Have you decided on what to do with Aha?

t_ch: 我和螺丝咕姆有个初步共识：首先，他会想办法削减虚拟阿哈的倾向性，甚至屏蔽祂的自我认知部分，但那有些危险，没准会引来真正的「欢愉」……
t_en: I have a basic consensus with Screwllum. First, he'll try reducing the partiality values of the simulated Aha, even going as far as blocking THEIR Intra-Cognition — but that's a little dangerous and may attract the real Elation...

t_ch: 如果我们评估下来不可行，大概会放任这个阿哈随便玩耍，隔绝掉祂和其它虚拟星神的交流吧。
t_en: If we feel that method is unfeasible, then we'll probably leave this Aha to play however THEY like, while isolating THEM from communicating with the other simulated Aeons.

t_ch: 你常挂在嘴边的斯蒂芬是谁？
t_en: Who's this Stephen you keep going on about?

t_ch: 唔，他是我们的第四个合伙人，#84「怪人」斯蒂芬•劳艾德。作为一个天才，这家伙对发挥才能毫无兴趣，每天2/3的时间花在他养父的水果店里。
t_en: Oh, he's our fourth partner, member #84, Stephen "Weirdo" Lloyd. That guy's a genius with no interest in using his abilities, and spends two-thirds of his time in his adoptive father's fruit shop.

t_ch: 对「模拟宇宙」这么酷的项目，他也提不起劲儿。斯蒂芬帮了我们一点忙，他本人要求匿名，不想大张旗鼓，可能有些天才就是不愿意成为天才吧。
t_en: He can't even get himself excited about something as cool as the Simulated Universe. Stephen did us a favor and asked to remain anonymous — he doesn't want to make a big splash at all. Perhaps some geniuses wish they weren't one.

t_ch: 算了，没事。
t_en: Forget it, it's nothing.

t_ch: 好。
t_en: Alright.

t_ch: 新的版本嘛，变化还挺多的，要我给你个更新清单吗？
t_en: The new version has lots of changes. Do you want me to give you the patch notes?

t_ch: 你口述就行。
t_en: Just say them out loud to me.

t_ch: 你还真不客气…
t_en: You have zero manners...

t_ch: 首先，斯蒂芬大幅调整了流程，按他的说法「在每个阶段的挑战目标会更明确」——我不大理解。但我是天才，不代表我很懂游戏，所以随他吧。
t_en: Firstly, Stephen has made significant adjustments to the gameplay loop. According to him, "The challenge goal of each phase is even clearer" — I don't really get it. Just because I'm a genius doesn't mean I understand gaming — so whatever he says goes.

t_ch: 这个版本提供了更高的自由度：你可以自由搭配自己的队伍，选择更多样的祝福，还会有随机发生的事件确保每次都有不同的体验。
t_en: This version offers a higher degree of freedom. You can mix and match your team, choose from a variety of Blessings, and there are even random events to guarantee you a unique experience every time.

t_ch: 最后，还加入了一点小机制，帮助你更好地假扮阿基维利。
t_en: Finally, there's a new mechanic that helps you to better pretend to be Akivili.

t_ch: 我自己体验吧。
t_en: I'll figure it out myself.

t_ch: 好啊，保持新奇。
t_en: Alright, stay curious.

t_ch: 不用，我没兴趣。
t_en: Nah, I'm not interested.

t_ch: 好啊，你玩了就知道。
t_en: Alright. You'll find out soon enough.

t_ch: 有多个世界供你选择，难度循序渐进。
t_en: There are many worlds to choose from, with progressive difficulties.

t_ch: 现在你可以选择自己认识的人加入队伍，他们的能力也和现实中你的认知一致。
t_en: Now you can choose from people you know to join your team. Their abilities are consistent with your perception of them in reality.

t_ch: 准备好了就按这个按钮，机器会将你传送到第一世界。
t_en: Press this button when you're ready and the machine will teleport you to World 1.

t_ch: 你的手脚突然不听使唤。黑塔——「模拟宇宙」的最高权力者又冻结了你的行动权限，人偶没好气的声音在耳边响起：<color=#dbc291ff>「你怎么不去打那个东西？」</color>
t_en: You suddenly lose control of your limbs. Herta — the Simulated Universe's most powerful being — has revoked your permissions again, and the puppet's angry voice sounds in your ear: <color=#dbc291ff>"Why didn't you hit that thing?"</color>

t_ch: 什么？
t_en: What?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「那个东西。」</color>黑塔不耐烦地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「就是你平时走在路上，会用球棒打破的玩意儿。你怎么不去打它了？没看见吗？」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"That thing."</color> Herta says impatiently. <color=#dbc291ff>"You usually smash it with a bat when you walk past. Why didn't you go and hit it? Can't you see it?"</color>

t_ch: 不好意思，我没看见。
t_en: Sorry, I didn't see it.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「居然没看见…」</color>你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，<color=#dbc291ff>「小小年纪，一点都不知道观察生活……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"You didn't see it..."</color> You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. <color=#dbc291ff>"You are so young, yet you have no idea how to be observant..."</color>

t_ch: 我很健康，不需要打。
t_en: I'm psychologically well and don't need to hit anything.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「真势利…」</color>你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，<color=#dbc291ff>「玩游戏不就是把看到的一切都打烂吗……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"What a snob..."</color> You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. <color=#dbc291ff>"Isn't playing games all about smashing up everything you can see...?"</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「这次不一样，这里是『模拟宇宙』。」</color>黑塔叹了口气，<color=#dbc291ff>「在『模拟宇宙』里，可破坏物会掉落珍贵的东西，也就是宇宙碎片。现在，回去把那玩意打了。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"This time it's different. This is the Simulated Universe."</color> Herta sighs once again. <color=#dbc291ff>"In the Simulated Universe, destructible objects can drop precious things called Cosmic Fragments. Now, go back and smash those things up."</color>

t_ch: 结束。
t_en: Finish.

t_ch: 「模拟宇宙」里的可破坏物还会掉宇宙碎片哦。
t_en: Destructible objects in the Simulated Universe will drop Cosmic Fragments.
(Huh... That's...)

t_ch: 黑塔的人偶出现在模拟宇宙里，她之前只用声音和你交流，因此这次现身着实令人意外。她看了看你，面无表情。
t_en: Herta's puppet appears in the Simulated Universe. Having only communicated with you via voice before, it's a little surprising to see her manifesting like this. She looks at you expressionlessly.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「这是休整区域，在可怕的模拟宇宙中为你提供喘息之地。我们希望这里能够回复生命，复活队友，购买装备，强化祝福什么的。」</color>黑塔用不负责任的声音说道，<color=#dbc291ff>「不过这才是第一世界，你用不着那么多功能，所以你只能强化祝福。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"This is the resting area, giving you a place to catch your breath in an otherwise scary Simulated Universe. We hope you can restore your health, resurrect your team, buy equipment, and enhance your Blessings here."</color> Herta says in an irresponsible tone. <color=#dbc291ff>"But this is just World 1. You don't need too many features, so you can only enhance Blessings."</color>

t_ch: 强化祝福？
t_en: Enhance Blessings?

t_ch: 我需要那些功能！
t_en: I need those other features too!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「嗯，嗯。」</color>黑塔敷衍地应和，<color=#dbc291ff>「作为游戏的管理员，我有权将你的祝福变得更强，甚至发生翻天覆地的变化——以一定的宇宙碎片作为代价，不然搜集那些碎片有什么用？现在就开始吧。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Mmm. Mmm."</color> Herta replies flippantly. <color=#dbc291ff>"As the game master, I can make your Blessings stronger, or even make earth-shattering changes to them — at the price of Cosmic Fragments. What's the point in collecting those otherwise? Now then, let's begin."</color>

t_ch: 打开强化界面。
t_en: Open the Enhance screen.

t_ch: 走近那个光点，去吧。
t_en: Approach that spot of light. Go on.

t_ch: 你看见一个男人，他大约三十岁，其貌不扬，上着一件白衬衫，下身是褐色的吊带裤。当他开口时，他的眼神四处游弋，像在躲闪：<color=#dbc291ff>「呃，我想给这个游戏加点儿随机事件，那会很好玩…不过，似乎脑波读取器的稳定性有点问题。所以，呃，现在你碰到的事件会比较，呃，单调。我很抱歉。」</color>
t_en: You see a man about thirty years old with an unremarkable appearance, wearing a white shirt and brown suspenders. His eyes wander while he speaks, as if he's avoiding something. <color=#dbc291ff>"Uh, I wanted to add some random Occurrences to this game to make it more fun... But I think the brainwave reader is on the fritz. So, uh, now the events you encounter will be a little more, uh, bland. Sorry about that."</color>

t_ch: 你在说啥？
t_en: What are you talking about?

t_ch: 有多单调？
t_en: How bland will they be?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「比如，」</color>男人没有看你，他磕磕绊绊地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「呃，比如，这就是个随机事件。我写了一些模板，但『模拟宇宙』现在没办法把它转换成有效的内容。所以你会看到下面这些……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Like,"</color> he stutters without looking at you, <color=#dbc291ff>"like, uh, this is a random Occurrence now. I wrote some templates, but the Simulated Universe currently can't convert them into content. So, you will just see the following..."</color>

t_ch: 说着，男人的身影消失了，他所在的地方出现了一行字：你遇到了「商店」事件。
t_en: After speaking, the man disappears and a line of words materializes where he was standing: "You have encountered a Shop event"

t_ch: 购买一个随机普通祝福
t_en: Buy a random normal Blessing

t_ch: 购买一个随机稀有祝福
t_en: Buy a random rare Blessing

t_ch: 什么也不做
t_en: Do nothing

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「呃，就是这么单调。」</color>男人的声音说，他似乎是真的很抱歉。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Uh, yeah, that's how bland it'll be for now."</color> The man says as if he is genuinely sorry.

t_ch: 好吧，我理解。
t_en: Alright, I understand.

t_ch: 勉强能够接受。
t_en: A borderline acceptable solution.

t_ch: 什么时候能修好？
t_en: When will it be fixed?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「希望很快就能修复。」</color>男人诚恳地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「我真的很想你玩得愉快，真的。呃，再次向你道歉。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Hopefully very soon,"</color> the man says earnestly. <color=#dbc291ff>"I really want you to have a good time. Really. Um, once again, I'm really sorry about that."</color>

t_ch: 结束。
t_en: Finish.

t_ch: 第一世界就这样了，你可以去挑战下一个世界。第二世界会出现更强的敌人。
t_en: That's World 1. You can push on and challenge the next world, with stronger enemies appearing in World 2.

t_ch: 听说难度会高一点，敌人也会变得更强。螺丝咕姆说按照他的模型，你有<unbreak>60%</unbreak>的可能性在首次挑战时输掉，不过反正没啥损失。
t_en: Apparently it's more difficult with stronger enemies. Screwllum said that, according to his model, you have a <unbreak>60%</unbreak> chance of losing the first time, but it's not like you'll actually lose anything.

t_ch: 总会通关的。
t_en: You'll clear it sooner or later.

t_ch: 你们真的想研究星神吗？
t_en: Are you folks really here to research Aeons?

t_ch: 我感觉越来越像游戏了…
t_en: This is feeling more and more like a real game...

t_ch: 说什么呢，我们的目标是不会变的。现在快去准备。
t_en: What are you talking about? Our goals haven't changed. Now run off and get ready.

t_ch: 这个敌人的数据好像有点问题…它的能力和战法和你印象中的不一样。
t_en: There seems to be something wrong with this enemy's data... Its abilities and tactics are different from what you remember.

t_ch: 不能把现实的经验套用在这种敌人身上，换用新的打法吧。
t_en: You can't apply real-world experience to this kind of enemy. Let's switch up the rules of the game, then.

t_ch: 哈，你得到了一个「奇物」！我从收藏里挑了点有趣的东西放进「模拟宇宙」里了。
t_en: Ha, you got a Curio! I picked out some interesting stuff from my collection and uploaded them to the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: 「奇物」有持续性的效果，它的获取会改变你接下来的探索体验。
t_en: Curios give a persistent buff, and they are going to completely rewrite your subsequent exploration.

t_ch: 第二世界的难度大吗？
t_en: Was World 2 difficult?

t_ch: 太难了。
t_en: It was way too hard.

t_ch: 小菜一碟。
t_en: Piece of cake.

t_ch: 数值怎么回事！
t_en: What happened to the numbers!?

t_ch: 唔，「模拟宇宙」做了个技能树系统，我在犹豫要不要启用…如果开启了，你在「模拟宇宙」里会慢慢变强，但这么做是不是好事，我说不清。你先试试吧。
t_en: Well, the Simulated Universe has an Ability Tree system. I'm debating whether to enable it... If I do, you'll gradually grow stronger in the simulation, but I can't say for sure whether that's a good thing. You try it out first.

t_ch: 你想要的变化来了，现在你可以选择不同的行进路线。下一个区域的内容会显示在门上。
t_en: The change you wanted is here. Now you can choose a different travel route. The content for the next domain will be displayed on the door.

t_ch: 你甫一进入「模拟宇宙」，就听见黑塔抑制不住兴奋的声音：<color=#dbc291ff>「{NICKNAME}，」</color>你听得出她在努力佯装正常，<color=#dbc291ff>「目前的『模拟宇宙』你还适应吗？」</color>
t_en: You can hear Herta's excitement as soon as you enter the Simulated Universe: <color=#dbc291ff>"{NICKNAME}," </color>she asks, trying to play it cool, <color=#dbc291ff>"have you adapted to this version of the Simulated Universe yet?"</color>

t_ch: 适应。
t_en: Yes.

t_ch: 不太适应。
t_en: Not really.

t_ch: 你真的在乎答案吗？
t_en: Do you even care?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「哦，好，明白了，这样啊。」</color>黑塔流畅地回答，<color=#dbc291ff>「有个好消息告诉你：通过这段时间的沉浸体验与学习，这台机器已经很适应你了，现在你通过深度沉浸，让『模拟宇宙』引导你的意识，为你打造专属的『位面饰品』。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Ah, okay, I see. Got it."</color> Herta replies smoothly. <color=#dbc291ff>"I've got some good news for you: The computer's grown highly adapted to you throughout all the immersion experiences and machine learning we've been doing. Now you can immerse yourself deeper. Let the Simulated Universe guide your mind and build your own exclusive Planar Ornament."</color>

t_ch: 引导意识？
t_en: Guide my mind?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「只是个说法，不用在意。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"It's just a manner of speech. Don't think about it too much."</color>

t_ch: 位面饰品？
t_en: Planar Ornament?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「很有用的纪念品。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Some truly useful souvenirs."</color>

t_ch: 又加新系统了？
t_en: Another new system?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「是呀。当你想面面俱到的时候，事情就会越变越复杂。做减法是一门艺术，目前我们还不打算搞艺术。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Yup, things get more complicated when you try to cover all your bases. Minimalism is a real art form, and we're not doing enough of it right now."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「机器利用你的意识，为『模拟宇宙』增添变量，从而产生『或然的世界』。接着，外面的我利用研究裂界掌握的遗器复制技术，把这部分数据提取出来，制作成『位面饰品』。它就像是一种遗器，只不过更庞大…也更浓缩。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"The machine uses your mind to add variables into the Simulated Universe, thereby generating what we call a Probable World. Then, I will use Relic-cloning technology mastered from Fragmentum research to extract this part from the data, creating a Planar Ornament. It's like a kind of Relic, but much bigger... and much more condensed."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「在这里就不多说了，接着探索吧，可以进行沉浸的时候我再向你说明。」</color>她难得地笑了一声。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"That's all you need to know for now. Get exploring, and I'll fill in the gaps once you are ready to get immersed."</color>She lets out a laugh, a rare thing from her.

t_ch: 这是沉浸装置，它会生成「位面饰品」数据。退出后，我会把「位面饰品」给你。
t_en: This is an immersion device that can generate Planar Ornament data. I'll give you the Planar Ornaments once you exit the simulation.

t_ch: 使用它还是非常耗神的，你可以把一部分开拓力储存起来，在沉浸时使用。
t_en: They are really exhausting to use, so save up some of your Trailblaze Power and use those for immersion.

t_ch: 我还是有很多困惑。
t_en: I'm still very confused.

t_ch: 我还是有很多困惑。
t_en: I'm still very confused.

t_ch: 你静待在原地，渴望跟上岚的速度。但时间缓慢流逝…什么也没发生。
t_en: You wait in place, hoping you can keep up with Lan. As time slowly slips by, nothing happens.

t_ch: 「忘了告诉你，<color=#dbc291ff>岚在这时还没出现</color>。」黑塔开始拨自己头上的花，一片一片地扯，「『繁育』陨落是很久以前的事，远早于岚的诞生。」
t_en: "I've forgotten to tell you that <color=#dbc291ff>Lan hadn't emerged at this period</color>." Herta starts plucking out the flowers on her head one by one as she continues, "The fall of the Propagation took place a long time ago. It was way earlier than Lan's birth."

t_ch: 所以祂和这事无关？
t_en: So Lan has nothing to do with this matter?

t_ch: 「显然。」黑塔开始敷衍，「不过你也不会白费力气，模拟宇宙可能会推演出一些历史上不存在的命途痕迹。虽然祂不会来了…」
t_en: "Obviously so." Herta explains perfunctorily, "Your effort won't go to waste, as the Simulated Universe might reveal some traces of the Path that aren't recorded in history. Still, Lan won't be coming..."

t_ch: 我怀念被祂的利箭刺穿！
t_en: I miss being pierced through by THEIR arrows!

t_ch: 「不要对星神产生不必要的依恋。」黑塔皱着眉头嫌弃你，「虽然这次见不到祂啰，不过你也不会白费力气，模拟宇宙也可能推演出一些历史上不存在的命途痕迹。虽然祂不会来了…」
t_en: "Don't get too attached to an Aeon." Herta frowns at you with disgust. "Although you can't meet Lan this time, your effort won't go to waste, as the Simulated Universe might reveal some traces of the Path that aren't recorded in history. Still, Lan won't be coming..."

t_ch: 祂不会来了！这句话侵入你的脑海，被你反复咀嚼。祂不会来了！它来回闪烁…你感到自己像吞下镇静药剂一般知觉失调。接着！黑塔的声音渐渐被拉远，胡作非为的意象在你的脑中乱窜……
t_en: "Lan won't be coming..." You ruminate over this as the words invade your mind. The thought flashes all over, throwing your senses off-balance as though you have just downed a bottle of sedative. Next, Herta's voice gradually fades away while chaotic and delusional images wreak havoc in your brain...

t_ch: 祂不会来了…你还是渴望见到祂？向宇宙祈祷吧，三秒之后，或许你可以……
t_en: THEY won't be coming... but you still long to meet THEM. Make a prayer to the universe, and you might see THEM in three seconds...

t_ch: 你睁开双眼，却发现自己身在一片绚丽的画廊中央！趁着蓝皮肤的老头史学家出门，你那积蓄已久——渴望更加迅捷的<color=#dbc291ff>巡猎</color>信仰压制了其他的躁动，你迅速吸取了无数图画，它们像春天的剖面一样变换着花瓣的颜色…意象的王国在加速流动的时空里愈筑愈高。
t_en: You open your eyes and find yourself in the middle of a colorful gallery! While the blue-skinned elderly historian is out, your long-accumulated desire for greater swiftness in <color=#dbc291ff>The Hunt</color> overpowers your other impulses. You quickly absorb numerous paintings, their petals changing colors like the cross-section of spring... The imaginary kingdom grows stronger in the accelerated flow of time.

t_ch: 穿过图画，感官对知识的索取如同狂热的欲望一般加速。直觉像鲜艳的螃蟹爬过你的脑海，最终你在那幅最疯狂的、散发着怪异色彩的<color=#dbc291ff>贡多拉</color>前停下了。在虚与实的边界中，你甚至有献祭自我的冲动，寻找「繁育」陨落的真相……
t_en: Moving through the paintings, your senses' demand for knowledge elevates to a burning desire, and your intuition creeps through your brain like a brightly-colored crab. At last, you stop before the craziest painting of a <color=#dbc291ff>gondola</color> in odd colors. In the boundary between the virtual and the real, you even feel the urge to sacrifice yourself in return for the truth behind the fall of the Propagation...

t_ch: …祂为什么一定要死？
t_en: ...Why did THEY have to die?

t_ch: 你凭借巡猎的直觉找到了答案所在的那一页——是概念的膨胀！祂的子嗣吞噬了太多食物…祂毁坏了宇宙「秩序」…祂威胁了世间「均衡」…祂拦住了「开拓」的道路…
t_en: With The Hunt's instinct, you find the page with the answer — it is the expansion of concepts! THEIR descendants have gobbled up too much food... THEY have disrupted the Order of the universe... THEY have threatened the Equilibrium of the universe... THEY have blocked the way of the Trailblaze...

t_ch: 这…都是祂的罪。
t_en: These... are THEIR sins.

t_ch: …祂为何而诞育？
t_en: ...Why were THEY born?

t_ch: 你凭借巡猎的直觉找到了答案所在的那一页——这是完全空白的一页；这本书从后往前撰写，结局早已注定，而起因却可被任意书写…无论是哪个可怜虫被利用，对棋局都毫无关系。
t_en: With The Hunt's instinct, you find the page with the answer — it is a blank page. The book is written in reverse chronology, with the ending predetermined. Yet, the cause can be made up arbitrarily. Whoever is the poor soul that is manipulated will have no bearing on the big picture.

t_ch: …好吧，但我还是想见岚。
t_en: ...Fine then, but I still want to see Lan.

t_ch: 「说了这不可能。」黑塔耸了耸鼻子，「除非我把祂的出生日期用修改器强行调一下。但这还有什么意义？」
t_en: "I've told you that isn't possible." Herta scrunches her nose and adds, "Unless I change THEIR date of birth with the modifier, but what's the point in doing so?"

t_ch: …好吧，模拟宇宙会给我点什么吗？
t_en: ...Fine then. Will I get anything from the Simulated Universe?

t_ch: 「报酬想要多少都有的是。」黑塔讥笑着，「继续玩就是了。」
t_en: "You'll get paid whatever you ask for," Herta chuckles. "Just keep playing."

t_ch: 「根据你的脑前额叶活动，多巴胺会在三秒后大量涌入——你熟悉的家伙要来了。」阮•梅只陈述事实，「但不完全一样。」
t_en: "Based on your prefrontal cortex's activity, dopamine will be flooding into your brain in three seconds. That familiar experience will come soon, but it will be slightly different this time," Ruan Mei states matter-of-factly.

t_ch: 躁动的意象在你的脑中乱窜…你相信！保护可有多种方式，你的开拓之旅无论以何种姿态，都可以抚慰众生。
t_en: Chaotic images run rampant in your mind... You believe that protection can take various forms, and your trailblazing expedition, regardless of its form, will bring solace to all beings.

t_ch: 蒸汽浮现，你有种熟悉的感受——更多幽灵生命从黄油中绽开，巨大的城墙下满是虫壳蝶翅的尸骸，那些寰宇灾祸被祂的城墙挡在了外边；更多生灵正在巨大的城墙脚下运土，将它愈筑愈高……
t_en: As the steam is rising, you experience a familiar sensation. More specters come to live from the butter, and there are heaps of insect carcasses and butterfly wings at the bottom of the fortress. THEIR walls keep the disasters in the universe at bay. Many creatures are toiling away to build the fortress higher and higher.

t_ch: 一点灵感乍现！在雾气里你似乎看到——那从庇佑的土地中汲取万千尘料汇聚而成的庞大身躯！哈，你轻松地明白了：大概是那位模拟的祂要来了！…你似乎都能够听见祂的锤子在地上拖出难以忍受的刮磨声。喔，你嗅了嗅鼻子，却嗅到了异常的气味……
t_en: A spark of inspiration hits you! Amid the steam, you seem to catch a glimpse of the massive body that takes form through the congregation of countless particles and dust from the earth under THEIR protection! Realization dawns on you — the simulated Aeon is coming! You seem to hear the ear-splitting scraping sound of THEM dragging THEIR hammer on the ground. You sniff the air and catch an unusual scent...

t_ch: 你相信这气味是种交流，攀谈者似古老旧友，而祂们的会晤非凡人可以妄想……
t_en: You believe the smell is a form of communication, and the speaker is akin to an old friend of yours.

t_ch: 天幕上有黯淡的铂金铝片，一只眼睛忽明忽暗…
t_en: In the sky, there are some dull platinum aluminum flakes and a flickering eye...

t_ch: 一种多变的声音从唇齿间挤出，如同雾气盖住你的耳朵，其间有上亿种调式音程——一个灰蓝色的影子笼罩住你。祂降身下来，友好地拢抱住琥珀王庞大而分散的头颅；祂似乎身形凑近…你终于听清祂的声音，是帝侯兵器同时发出的合音轰鸣，它们在祂身下如光芒般散开——
t_en: A voice that speaks in changing tones comes from between the lips and envelopes your ears like mist. In the meantime, there are <unbreak>100</unbreak> million tonal variations, and you are shrouded by a grayish-blue shadow. THEY descend and embrace the massive and scattered head of the Amber Lord. THEY seem to approach you, and you can finally hear THEIR voice clearly. It is a resounding chorus coming from the imperial weapons simultaneously. The weapons spread out beneath THEM like a beam.

t_ch:
「汝终应吾之邀请…克里珀；搅局者无有规法慎独，其行不将饶恕。」
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖ ♬ Jme-Clent-A. I. Vadnbg。<unbreak>1635</unbreak>-<unbreak>1942</unbreak>
「掌控嬗变之意志——琥珀王，汝本将重责无当。」
♬" Qecréiat Ineional es mpers"。<unbreak>1894</unbreak>-<unbreak>193</unbreak>
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖♬
t_en:
"You have finally accepted my invitation, Qlipoth. The troublemakers go against the rules. Their actions are unpardonable."
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖ ♬ Jme-Clent-A. I. Vadnbg. <unbreak>1635</unbreak>-<unbreak>1942</unbreak>
"Amber Lord, as one that controls the will of transmutation, you bear great responsibility."
♬" Qecréiat Ineional es mpers." <unbreak>1894</unbreak>-<unbreak>193</unbreak>
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖♬

t_ch: 「你听见了吗？」黑塔激动地拍起了手，「『秩序』向『存护』发起了邀请！要命，塔伊兹育罗斯是被众神合力置于死地的！克里珀的反应很有趣——看来『秩序』和祂有什么交易，我想八成也跟奥博洛斯相关！凭我对太一的了解，这家伙容忍不了任何『无序』。」
t_en: "Did you hear that?" Herta claps her hands excitedly. "The Order has extended an invitation to the Preservation! Tayzzyronth was put to death by the joint efforts of all Aeons! Qlipoth's response is intriguing. It seems like Qlipoth has a secret deal with the Order, and I'm eighty percent sure it is related to Oroboros! As far as I know about Ena's character, THEY could not tolerate any disorder."

t_ch: 我也想加入祂们的交流！
t_en: I'd like to join THEIR interaction!

t_ch: 「你当然可以，你是阿基维利，祂们会欢迎你加入的…噢，说不好你才是执棋之人。」黑塔对你眨了眨眼睛，「等你分清了祂们的立场，就加入！但可能也没什么用，毕竟朋友转身就变敌人…而你在这转个身——得花上多少琥珀纪？」
t_en: "By all means. As you are Akivili, THEY will welcome you to join THEM... Oh, you might even be the one that calls the shots." Herta gives you a wink and continues, "Join THEM after figuring out THEIR stances! It probably won't help, as friends can become enemies as you turn around... How many Amber Eras does it take for you to turn around here?"

t_ch: 你察觉阮•梅的模拟形象轻盈地翕动着。她正欲言又止地注视一个于推演中生成的含糊剪影：
t_en: You notice Ruan Mei's virtual image swaying gracefully. She hesitates to speak while gazing at a blurry image generated in the derivation.

t_ch: 那庞大剪影在太阳下只有轮廓被勾勒清楚…祂腕处的琥珀被怒气所聚集！它们震动、跳跃！其轨迹如正指挥巨大石杵巨锤——你看不到更多了。但这只是一个剪影，轮廓的背后理应还有更多、更多的……
t_en: Only the silhouette of the massive image is outlined clearly under the sun... The Ambers are gathering at the Aeon's wrists due to THEIR rage! The Ambers are shaking and popping, and their trajectories are like a giant hammer that is commanding a huge stone mortar and pestle. You cannot see anything more. There should be more behind the silhouette of the image...

t_ch: 凑近一些。
t_en: Get closer.

t_ch: 你伸手抚摸脸颊，似乎什么东西溅到了你的脸上…触觉并不美妙。
t_en: You reach for the cheeks and feel something splashed onto your face... The sensation isn't pleasant.

t_ch: 站远一点。
t_en: Stand further away.

t_ch: 你离得更远了……
t_en: You move further away...

t_ch: 你看不清了！你企图动用别的五官…你闭上眼睛开始聆听：祂的巨锤落下，震慑大地的却并非巨响，而是锤下之物毫无生息的呜咽；你又隐约觉得那声音中有种笑声，或是有万种声音的合奏……
t_en: You can't see it anymore! You try using your other senses... With your eyes closed, you focus on your hearing: The Aeon's giant hammer falls, but what shakes the earth is not the thunderous sound, but the lifeless whimper of the thing that is hammered. From the sound, you hear what sounds like subtle laughter or the symphony of numerous sounds...

t_ch: 你根本无法听懂神的声音！但那里不止一种、两种、三种……！
t_en: You cannot understand the Aeon's voice! There are more than one, two, or three voices!

t_ch: 此刻，一种异样的感受袭来：你察觉到一个含糊的感受！「繁育」正在被稀释…祂的死亡像淡彩墨水在海的咸味里散开，「存护」正在将祂的碎壳、躯体与心脏剥去…接着还有第二份概念在被抽离…祂正被继续稀释，集群的力量也从崩离中逃离，更多或暴虐、或冷静的力量分解着祂……
t_en: At that moment, an odd feeling strikes you, and you perceive a subtle sensation! The Propagation is being diluted... THEIR death is similar to a blot of light-colored ink that spreads out in the ocean. The Preservation is stripping the Aeon of THEIR broken shell, body, and heart... Next, the second concept is extracted... The Aeon is being further diluted, and the collective power is escaping from the disintegration. More forces, whether violent or calm, are disintegrating THEM...

t_ch: 这场面令人惊奇：这些太阳也变得奇怪，它比正常星寰下应存在的数量更多、温度更加热烈不堪！你发现…那一柄巨锤上掀起怒气的风暴！
t_en: The scene is a mind-blowing one. The Suns are abnormal, as they are more in number and higher in temperature than normal! You discover that... the giant hammer has conjured up a storm of rage!

t_ch: 壳褶与神音的颤抖在彩色血液四溅下被掩盖，生着獠牙与触角的原初之卵从祂身侧脚旁逃逸、奔流，并在离开祂的躯壳时立刻死去！祂的汁液涂裹大地，盛大的分娩于热烈与死亡之中发生——在众卵禁忌、欢欣的逃散中！
t_en: The trembling of the shell folds and the Aeon's sound is overshadowed by the splattering of colorful blood. The primordial eggs, bearing fangs and antennae, escape and slip away, only to perish immediately upon leaving the Aeon's body! The ground is covered by THEIR fluid, as a grand labor takes place in the middle of fervor and death — amidst the forbidden dispersal and joyous escape of the eggs!

t_ch: 「…离远点，{NICKNAME}，你靠得太近…被『存护』影响了。」
t_en: "...Keep your distance, {NICKNAME}. You'll be affected by the Preservation... should you get too close."

t_ch: 于蓝绿色的月亮下——辉光渐褪。<color=#dbc291ff>祂仿佛…正在陨落</color>。
t_en: The glow wanes beneath the bluish-green moon. <color=#dbc291ff>THEY seem to be... falling</color>.

t_ch: 「目瞪口呆…你把这份活干得超出预期了…」黑塔按耐不住震惊，却又不敢大声说话，只轻悄悄地，「我们现在只能加载出这一时刻琥珀王的身影！…无所谓，我会记录下这些！」
t_en: "Amazing... Your performance exceeds my expectations..." Herta can barely contain her surprise, but she dares not speak too loud. So, she whispers, "Now, we can only load the image of Amber Lord at this moment! It doesn't matter. I'll record everything."

t_ch: 还有吗？
t_en: Is there more?

t_ch: 你顺着那巨锤席卷而起的剧烈风暴，触摸到碎裂的白色布料…几片随风而动的拼图…剧烈太阳下模糊的身影宛若庞大静默的雕塑，在这异常强大的压力下…
t_en: You follow the violent storm conjured up by the giant hammer and come into contact with the tattered white cloth... There are several puzzle pieces that sway with the wind... Under the blazing sun, the blurry figure resembles a massive and silent statue. Under the immense pressure...

t_ch: …你无法靠近祂们，只能静默地跪拜。终于，你意识到，这就是那一刻…你只能捕捉到符号的些微颤动，洒落到实在界，如同幽灵；而凡人实在无法辨认，听不懂神的语言，连神的锤声与呜咽声也无法分清。
t_en: ...You can't get close to THEM, so you can only kneel in silence. Finally, you realize this is the moment... You can only capture the slightest fluttering of the symbols when THEY are spilled into the realm of reality like specters. Mortals simply cannot discern or comprehend the language of gods. THEY can't even distinguish the sound of a god's hammer and whimpering.
████You are waiting in place.██ █████You feel sleepy,████████████████ yet nothing happens████████████████.

t_ch: 「起床。」阮•梅言简意赅，她示意黑塔该让你起床。
t_en: "Wake up," Ruan Mei speaks straightforwardly, signaling Herta to wake you up.

t_ch: 「我就一会儿没看着…你的脑电波已经画成zzZ的形状了。」黑塔不耐烦地把自己接入进来，「模拟宇宙有这么无聊？确实有点。不过恭喜你，由于你太懒，反而在虚无命途上突飞猛进。就在这儿等祂，不过你得小心，万一祂把系统某个按键吞没，你就没法玩了。」
t_en: "I was only away for a short while, and the chart of your brainwaves already showed the zzZ." Sounding irritated, Herta connects herself to the Simulated Universe. "Is the Simulated Universe really that boring? It can be, but I must congratulate you, as you have made great progress on the Path of Nihility thanks to your laziness. Still, you need to be careful. If the Aeon swallows one of the buttons of the system, that will end your journey."

t_ch: 模拟宇宙确实很无聊！
t_en: The Simulated Universe bores me to death!

t_ch: 「你可以自己上。等你加入天才俱乐部，我就把斯蒂芬踢了。」黑塔摊手。
t_en: "You can do this on your own. Wait till you join the Genius Society, I'll kick Stephen out." Herta shrugs.

t_ch: 我还想再睡一会。
t_en: Let me sleep for a while longer.

t_ch: 你感受到阮•梅的目光落在你身上；但她一言不发。
t_en: You can sense Ruan Mei's gaze on you, but she doesn't say a word.

t_ch: 一种强烈的困意席卷了你…这种空虚像失恋后的第一个清晨。
t_en: A strong wave of lethargy washes over you... The emptiness feels like the first morning after a breakup.

t_ch: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
t_en: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...
█████████Although you can feel ███, the Aeon's ████████████ ██████████appearance, you can hardly █████████.

t_ch: 「出什么事了？」黑塔说，「你怎么像睡着了一样？噢，难道Ⅸ又来了？快离远点！」
t_en: "What's going on?" Herta asks. "Why do you seem to be asleep? Oh, is IX here again? Stay away from it!"

t_ch: 你还没有反应过来，黑塔的声音开始变得渐渐扭曲……
t_en: You have yet to come to senses, and Herta's voice starts becoming distorted...

t_ch: 「我敢断定，这家伙完全、彻底在状况外。Ⅸ能有什么理由在乎塔伊兹育罗斯？」黑塔说，「但是{NICKNAME}，你得赶快脱身。你以为在模拟宇宙里摸鱼没有代价？祂刚刚肯定出现过，让你的一部分神经失去了知觉，你别被Ⅸ吞没了——」
t_en: "I'm sure IX doesn't know what it's doing. Does IX have any reason to care about Tayzzyronth?" Herta adds, "But, you need to get out of the place quickly, {NICKNAME}. Do you think you can slack off in the Simulated Universe without paying the price? The Aeon must have appeared just now and made some of your nerves go numb. Don't be swallowed by IX..."

t_ch: 你听到什么了？很多声音涌入了你的脑海。
t_en: What can you hear? All kinds of sounds are surging into your brain.

t_ch: 你按捺下躁动的心跳，仔细倾听；这声音存在一些疑点：它们像动物、植物与婴儿在哭，却又异常成熟。而这啼哭的生命并未获得关心…无人在意它们即将凋零的命运。多只无形的手于虚空中收集捕捞…那些跳跃的影子于半空中闪烁。
t_en: You steady your heartbeat and listen carefully to the odd sounds. They sound like animals, plants, and babies crying, but with a hint of maturity. The crying creatures fail to get any attention... No one cares about them although they are dying. Multiple invisible arms are collecting and capturing them in the void... Those moving shadows flicker in midair.

t_ch: 怪声音…但浮黎在哪里？细碎的声音被海潮声掩盖，你突然发现自己置身在海洋中！这是一片红色的海洋……
t_en: The odd sounds... Where is Fuli? As the delicate and intermittent sounds are drowned out by the sound of waves, you find yourself in the middle of the ocean! It is a sea of red...

t_ch: 没错，红色的！在赭红太阳的映照下，这片海洋变成了红色的！这一阵曼妙歌声，如同诱惑从剧烈海潮声中袭来…祂是在引你上勾，制造腴美的饵料。那生着獠牙、触角的脖颈如同山肉片海，蠕动的肉料反而要将你吞噬。
t_en: Yes, it's red! Under the scarlet sun, the ocean turns red! A beautiful and alluring singing voice comes from the choppy waves toward you... It is the Aeon's bait to lure you into a trap. The fanged and tentacled neck is as massive as the mountain and the sea, and its writhing flesh threatens to devour you.

t_ch: 你知道那一粒粒跳动的紫焰并不是抚平焦虑的救赎，但你忍不住跌入灯笼诱歌般的温柔中。祂当真是头汹涌的古兽！——并非是曼妙的、旧日铜蓝的、带有海潮般凶猛力量的爱人。你要用理智抵挡这种声音。但你又忍不住…你真的忍不住…想被祂吃掉……
t_en: You know the flickering purple flames are not the antidote that can alleviate your anxiety, but you can't help being drawn to the gentle singing voice. The Aeon is an outright brutal Leviathan! It isn't a charming lover as powerful as the waves. You must resist the voice, but you just can't help it... You can't help... hoping to be eaten by THEM...

t_ch: ——贪饕的星神？！
t_en: Aeon of Voracity!?

t_ch: 「停！我把模拟宇宙暂停了。贪饕的星神居然会在这里出现！」黑塔给你弹了个脑瓜崩，「离远点，别被吞进去了，奥博洛斯可不会绕着你——祂的嘴好大！我得再观赏一下。」
t_en: "Stop! I have paused the Simulated Universe. I didn't expect the Aeon of Voracity to be here!" Herta flicks your forehead and warns, "Stay away from THEM so that you won't be eaten. Oroboros isn't going to go around you. What a massive mouth THEY have! Let me admire it again."

t_ch: 我想被祂吃进胃里！
t_en: I want to be eaten by THEM!

t_ch: 「停！我把模拟宇宙暂停了。你压根抵御不了诱惑！贪饕的星神竟会在这里出现。」黑塔给你弹了个脑瓜崩，「离远点，别被吞进去了，奥博洛斯可不会绕着你——祂的嘴好大！我得再观赏一下。」
t_en: "Stop! I have paused the Simulated Universe. You can't resist the temptation at all! I didn't expect the Aeon of Voracity to be here." Herta flicks your forehead and warns, "Stay away from THEM so that you won't be eaten. Oroboros isn't going to go around you. What a massive mouth THEY have! Let me admire it again."

t_ch: 你的思绪被牵回。<color=#dbc291ff>奥博洛斯</color>的巨口吞下无数星球时，「记忆」的片段分成无数碎片涌入你的脑海：这是种浩瀚的诞育，有着万众哀嚎和吼叫声…是你听到的那些细碎的声音！
t_en: Your mind is pulled back to reality. When <color=#dbc291ff>Oroboros</color> is swallowing countless planets with their massive mouth, the clips of Remembrance split into endless fragments and flood your brain. It is a grand birth, accompanied by the wailing and roaring of all beings... They are the delicate and intermittent sounds you heard earlier!

t_ch: 「看起来虫潮在宇宙蔓延最盛时，『贪饕』奥博洛斯也张开了巨口——祂不仅吞下了无数塔伊兹育罗斯的子嗣，还吞下了无数世界！『繁育』和『贪饕』…听着就像一对冤家。」
t_en: "Seems like Oroboros the Voracity opened THEIR mouth when the spreading of the Swarm reached its peak in the universe. Not only did Oroboros devour countless heirs of Tayzzyronth, but THEY also swallowed numerous worlds! The Propagation and the Voracity... THEY sound like arch-enemies to me."

t_ch: 「还有『记忆』…真是奇怪，明明没有见到浮黎，却有无数记忆涌进了你的脑子。有人说『记忆』的命途正是在这一浩劫中出现的，为了留存诸星消亡的瞬间，倒是很合理——但太合理了，反而像虚构史学家编的。无论如何，我有点儿来兴致了。」
t_en: "And the Remembrance... Strangely, the memory fragments flood your brain even though there's no sight of Fuli. Now, it seems reasonable why some claim that the Path of Remembrance came about during this catastrophe to preserve the moment of the stars' demise. Yet, it is so reasonable that it sounds like it is made up by some History Fictionologist. Anyway, I'm intrigued."

t_ch: 以经验为尘料，对其揉合再造、创造的另一重境界谓之想象；而尘料本身的渐次消退却成为记忆。你的记忆时常存在疑点：回头望去，数百个琥珀纪前发生的事——你正在遍历。
t_en: The realm created by blending and recreating dust formed by your experience is called the imagination. When the dust fades, it becomes your memory, which often is unreliable. Looking back, you are going through events that took place hundreds of Amber Eras ago.

t_ch: 此刻，还有很多闪回如胶卷般在你面前穿梭：在那灾虐五纪的祸患中，「繁育」与「贪饕」争斗不休——
t_en: Numerous flashbacks are playing in your mind like a film reel — the Propagation and the Voracity fought incessantly during the calamity that spanned five eras.

t_ch: 祂的面容从海潮中升起，更多信徒的故事涌入——那是一只因信神而病入膏肓的凶兽，它伴着躁动的鼓点与奏曲，途经圣辉恍若星芒下的港湾，再次浮现于土地之上。那一枚掉落的鳞片被供至古国圣殿，彼时天鼓击声，彩灯下坠，一种力从骨骸中四溢，亡者呓语化作尘埃散开，两位乞讨者于街头敲起古碗，遮天蔽日的虫潮扑来纠缠撕咬，争斗中三声哀嚎如雷鸣炸开。
t_en: Oroboros's face rises from the waves, as more stories of THEIR believers inundate your mind. It is a ferocious beast that falls gravely sick due to its belief in the Aeon. Along with the lively drum beats and songs, the beast passes by a harbor beneath the glow of holy radiance, once again emerging upon the land. Its fallen scale is consecrated in a temple of the Primeval Imperium. Amid the resounding drum beats, the lanterns fall, a force overflows from the bones, and the murmurs of the deceased scatter like dust. Two beggars knock their ancient bowls on the street, while a relentless swarm engulfs and bites them. During the grapple, three agonized wails explode like thunder.

t_ch: 弄兽人起舞，以脚腕与趾尖勾勒方向，顺那一抹光芒，合唱者被潮水淹没后失语， 兄弟丢下桂冠后拥抱泣涕，然则世间更多哀亡，被吞没时更是悄声无息——接着，那头凶兽吸下虫潮时终于将盛怒止休，它如吞吐哀怒轻烟，身披彩宝鳞甲，仰头跳升向天空，却发出坠于海中的浪潮声。
t_en: The beastmaster dances and controls his movements with his ankles and toes following the streak of light. The choir members fall silent after being drowned by the tide, and the brothers cast aside their crowns and embrace each other in tears. Yet, more deaths have taken place in the world, and most of them happened in silence. The ferocious beast takes in the swarm next, finally putting an end to the Furor. It exhales the smoke of fury and is clad in colorful armor. With its head held high, it leaps to the sky and disappears. Only the sound of it plunging into the waves can be heard.

t_ch: ……但茫茫中，祂并不知晓，宇宙间不堪并逐渐升级的混乱尽在<color=#dbc291ff>秩序「太一」</color>的眼中。
t_en: ...Unbeknownst to the Aeon, <color=#dbc291ff>Ena the Order</color> is observing the devastating and escalating chaos in the universe.

t_ch: 让我摸摸祂的嘴。
t_en: Let me touch THEIR mouth.

t_ch: 你正犹豫该摸哪一只*嘴*…却恍惚间听见几个饱嗝，一些气息吐露到你脸上……
t_en: When you are thinking about which mouth to touch, you seem to hear a few burps and sense someone's breath on your face...

t_ch: 一切咻地一下猛然暂停！寒气突然逼迫到你的额前，宇宙某处的闪点中，祂棱镜般的面容从浓缩的原点里突然诞育——
t_en: Everything comes to an abrupt halt! Frosty air presses against your forehead. From a sparkling spot in the universe, THEIR prism-like face is suddenly born in a condensed origin...

t_ch: 祂从一个光点中突然演变成巨物，构成祂的片段凝固、倒转，接着平行、靠拢、交错；祂像一个镜子质感的口香糖瞬间膨胀。这是一瞬间的事：众多星系轰然倒塌毁灭。你惊愕万分，但你似乎揣摩到其意味所在：诸星正在坍塌消亡，而芸芸众生的祈愿——众消逝的记忆却正在凝结。
t_en: From a bright spot, THEY suddenly transform into a giant entity, the segments of which solidify, reverse, align, converge, and intertwine with each other. THEY expand in an instant like a mirror-like piece of gum. In the blink of an eye, numerous star systems collapse and crumble. You are dumbfounded, but you seem to be able to grasp its significance: The stars are collapsing, while the collective aspirations of countless beings — the vanishing memories — are crystallizing.

t_ch: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群哭泣的伶人。
t_en: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice changes into a chorus of weeping Mourning Actors.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>歌语对抗饕餮消亡交错哀语由衷捕捞沙王记忆海面背处子嗣吞噬搏斗伶人虚空倒转旧影撰写</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>lyric confront gluttony decease entwine eulogy sincere catch sand king memory sea surface backside children devour brawl actor void inverse vestige compose</color>

t_ch: 祂的音节令你浑身震颤，那些声音分裂成不同的人格，讲述着不同的故事。
t_en: THEIR syllables leave you trembling. Those voices split into different personalities, each telling a different story.

t_ch: 更多人生的闪回爬上你的前额叶！你突然获得众多在跌入虚无前被捕捞起的记忆！祂…希望你保存这些珍贵的记忆？但又是一刹那，所有的记忆都被同时按下了关机键——咻的一下，结束。你突然清醒：记忆断带如祂的消失般毫无征兆。
t_en: More flashbacks of your life creep into your prefrontal cortex! Suddenly, you retrieve many memories captured before you fall into the Nihility! Does the Aeon... want you to preserve these precious memories? In a split second, all memories are gone like someone has pressed the shut-down button. You gain lucidity at once, and your memories disconnect without any warning just like the Aeon's disappearance.

t_ch: 「原来如此…不可思议！」黑塔说，「不可思议！你看到了吗？那些记忆的浓缩——<color=#dbc291ff>可惜这些记忆明显不属于这一时期</color>。是哪里出了错，还能再精细一点吗？喔！再试试找祂？」
t_en: "I see... This is unbelievable!" Herta exclaims, "Unbelievable! Did you see the condensation of the memories? <color=#dbc291ff>It's a shame that these memories do not belong to this period</color>. What went wrong? Are there any more details? Oh! How about we try looking for the Aeon again?"

t_ch: 但回应你们的只有亘久的静止…黑塔耸了耸鼻子。「找不到了…记忆碎片对模拟宇宙来说可能太多了。这可是整个宇宙的历史！可怕的浮黎，祂令多少『记忆』得以留存？」
t_en: Resounding silence is the only response you two receive... Herta scrunches her nose and says, "They can no longer be found... The memory fragments might be too many for the Simulated Universe to handle. They contain the entire history of the universe! Fuli is terrifying. How many memories have THEY preserved?"

t_ch: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
t_en: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

t_ch: 你在原地等待——直到攻击的欲望平息下来。你相信你也懂得暴力美学…躁动的杀戮欲望会逐渐膨胀，你渴望与所有你恨的事物再次相逢。
t_en: You wait in place until your desire to attack subsides. You believe you understand the art of violence... Your desire to kill will grow over time, and you yearn to encounter the things you hate again.

t_ch: 是，我恨我的家庭。
t_en: Yes, I hate my family.

t_ch: 至少你有家，不是吗？这使你不会被「虚无」吞没。
t_en: At least you have a family, isn't it? Because of that, you won't be engulfed by the Nihility.

t_ch: 是，我恨我爱过的人。
t_en: Yes, I hate the people I've loved.

t_ch: 因为爱就是很痛的，至少你还可以表达。
t_en: It's because it hurts to love someone. At least, you know how to express your love.

t_ch: 不，我早已原谅一切。
t_en: No, I've long forgiven everything.

t_ch: 此刻，另一种光辉将你笼罩——你躁动的恨意突然停止了喧嚣。一切变得温顺，你的思维与行为，甚至情绪都被祂用线仞熨好。
t_en: At this moment, another type of light envelops you, appeasing your intense hatred all at once. Everything becomes peaceful. Your mind, your actions, and even your emotions are smoothed by the Aeon with threads.

t_ch: 但强烈的战斗渴望永远不会被浇灭！你突然觉得为了「毁灭」的「开拓」也不错…
t_en: However, your burning desire to fight will never be dampened! You suddenly find the idea of Trailblazing for the sake of Destruction to be acceptable...

t_ch: 「这是在做什么？」她皱眉，「我培育的宇宙土壤十分稳定，我想<color=#dbc291ff>毁灭不可能会出现在这里</color>。」
t_en: "What are you doing?" Ruan Mei frowns. "The soil of the universe I cultivate is very stable. I believe <color=#dbc291ff>Destruction will never appear here</color>."

t_ch: 「噢…我想看{NICKNAME}的内心戏。」黑塔耸了耸鼻子，十分整蛊，「纳努克是最年轻的星神，当然不可能和寰宇蝗灾有关！要是反物质军团也掺和进这场浩劫…天，想都不敢想。」
t_en: "Oh... I'd really love to see what's on {NICKNAME}'s mind." Herta scrunches her nose mischievously. "Nanook is the youngest Aeon, so they can't possibly have anything to do with the Swarm Disaster! I don't even dare imagine the Antimatter Legion becoming part of this disaster..."

t_ch: 「这会儿没有纳努克。」黑塔不是很快乐，「那我们还走毁灭命途干嘛，就为了狠狠打碎那些可破坏物？——都寰宇蝗灾了，还惦记你那可破坏物呢？」
t_en: "If there's no Nanook in this time period," Herta sounds upset as she continues, "then why are we still taking the Path of Destruction? Just to break those destructible objects? Swarm Disaster is going on! There's no time for those destructible objects of yours!"

t_ch: 「嘘…」阮•梅把指尖凑近唇语，周围突然安静。
t_en: "Shh..." Ruan Mei places her finger on her lips, and the surroundings fall silent at once.

t_ch: 你刚想把话接下去，却感到周围的气温骤低——你感到自己被一种古老的威严震慑，手脚突然被不可视的、如游丝般的细线吊起，仿佛有人在将你当作木偶操弄。
t_en: As you are about to speak, you feel a sudden dip in your surrounding temperature and the intimidation of an ancient authority. All of a sudden, your limbs are suspended by invisible strings, as though someone is manipulating you like a puppet.

t_ch: 祂的指节轻轻触动，拨动宇宙秩序千丝万缕。你躁动不安的破坏欲骤然止息…你并不确定，祂对你的安抚究竟是出自爱护，还是出于剧烈的、无可遏止的「秩序」？
t_en: The gentle movement of THEIR fingertips rattles the intricate order of the universe, causing your strong urge to destroy to come to a sudden halt... You are unsure whether THEY placate you out of love or out of an intense and unstoppable desire for "Order."

t_ch: 你看向祂——祂也同样看着你……
t_en: You look at THEM, and THEY look at you...

t_ch: 「哇——」黑塔两眼发光，像看到钻石，「是『秩序』太一，最古老的星神之一。在祂还未陨落的时代，祂的光辉如同珠石一般圣洁！我说什么来着？这会儿没有纳努克！古老的秩序命途压制着众多灾祸——你确定还要再靠近吗？让我推演下祂的声音。好，来了！」
t_en: "Wow!" Herta's eyes gleam as though she has just discovered diamonds. "It's Ena the Order, one of the most ancient Aeons. In the times before THEIR fall, THEIR radiance was as holy as gems! What did I say just now? Nanook had yet to exist in this time! The ancient Path of Order suppressed numerous calamities. Are you sure you want to get even closer? Let me simulate THEIR voice. Okay, THEY are coming!"

t_ch: 祂的身下有帝国轰鸣，信众轰然发出和声；祂似浮空却身形厚重，其面容有圣歌般的光辉；祂发出的每个字都像有纵向排列的音节，带有或黯淡或富丽的色调。
t_en: Empires thunder beneath the Aeon as the believers roar in harmony. The Aeon appears to float despite THEIR massive and heavy body, and THEIR countenance glows like a sacred hymn. Every word THEY utter sounds like vertically aligned syllables with either a somber or posh tone.

t_ch:
「亦又是何人制梦牵引，感染嬗变之意志？吾将控制秩序之一切，将搅局者清除出局。」
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖ ♬ Eme-Clent-J. I. Vadnbg。<unbreak>1935</unbreak>-<unbreak>1942</unbreak>
「扰乱世间者不得存留，贪婪者无应苟活；狡诈多变之混沌，是之为宇宙秽尘废埃也。」
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖♬ " Secréiat Ineional es mpers"。<unbreak>1894</unbreak>-<unbreak>193</unbreak>
t_en: "Who is the dreammaker that pulls and influences the will of transmutation? I shall keep the Order under complete control and eliminate the troublemakers."\n(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖ ♬ Eme-Clent-J. I. Vadnbg. <unbreak>1935</unbreak>-<unbreak>1942</unbreak>\n"The troublemakers shall not remain, and the greedy shall not be spared. The treacherous and fickle chaos is what contaminates the universe."(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖♬ " Secréiat Ineional es mpers." <unbreak>1894</unbreak>-<unbreak>193</unbreak>

t_ch: 祂绝对、公正、漂亮，多重音节有如军队般威严，其中藏匿着不容忽视的法则。
t_en: The Aeon is absolute, just, and magnificent. THEIR multiple syllables carrying the solemnity of an army, concealing within THEM a rule that must not be overlooked.

t_ch: 那只眼睛是…
t_en: That eye is...

t_ch: 你看向祂——祂也同样看着你。
t_en: You look at THEM, and THEY look at you.

t_ch: 那些多出来的声音是什么？
t_en: What are those extra sounds?

t_ch: 那些音节…组成祂的声音。那些名号…是于祂的控制下，依照确定的时代，顺序兴起后又湮灭的帝国、城邦、文明……
t_en: Those syllables... make up the Aeon's sound. Those names belong to the empires, states, and civilizations that have risen and fallen in predestined times and sequence in accordance with the Aeon's control...

t_ch: 那些你从未见过的存在。
t_en: It is an existence you've never seen before

t_ch: 你在原地等待——直至笑声突然出现，你一点也笑不出来。一些火花般的快乐又跳了出来，你甚至怀疑这些快乐长出了手脚，在你身边舞动…你对祂的到来多少有些畏惧，却又感到熟悉——没有谁像祂一样毫不防备、毫无虚伪！
t_en: You wait in place - until a sudden laughter comes. However, you can't laugh along. Some sparks of joy pop up, and you suspect that they are dancing around you with newly grown limbs... You more or less dread the Aeon's arrival, but it feels familiar to you at the same time. No one else can be as unguarded and unpretentious as THEM!

t_ch: 「阿基维利！」阿哈就这么堂堂正正地出现了，「我的阿基维利！我给你的骰子好玩吗？我要提问：我的骰子有几个面？」
t_en: "Akivili!" Just like that, Aha makes a straightforward appearance. "My dear Akivili! Did you have fun with the die I gave you? Here's my question: How many sides does my die have?"

t_ch: 可是你的骰子是个球。
t_en: But your die is spherical.

t_ch: 「回答正确！我想用球把塔伊兹育罗斯砸晕！」
t_en: "That's correct! I want to knock Tayzzyronth out with a ball!"

t_ch: 你就是个球！
t_en: You are a ball!

t_ch: 「是吗？可能还真是…阿基维利——你想到的比我更多！我忍不住想抱抱你了！」
t_en: "Is that so? It might be... Akivili, you're always more thoughtful than me. I feel like giving you a hug!"

t_ch: 「我要给你点奖励——来点小把戏怎么样？打烂这个游戏的经济系统，还是立刻送你去见星神？」阿哈开始拍手，「你做选择时最好小心点，不然可能废掉整个账号…难道我这样做很奇怪吗？」
t_en: "Let me give you some rewards. How about we set a trick in motion? Disrupt the economic system of this game, or have me send you to meet the Aeon right away?" Aha starts clapping. "You'd better be careful with your choice, or you might ruin your account... Is it weird for me to do this?"

t_ch: 「我所做一切都是为了帮助太一！」阿哈大笑着拍手，祂的皮球和扑克互相拥抱，「阿哈从来乐于助人，帮助其他神是我的乐趣——」接着祂把目光转移到你身上。
t_en: "Everything I do is to help Ena!" Aha claps while roaring with laughter. THEIR ball and poker cards hug each other. "Aha has always been helpful. It's my pleasure to help other Gods..." Then, Aha turns THEIR gaze to you.

t_ch: 「你不参与进来吗，假阿基维利？不接受我的点子吗，关于『星穹列车』与『塔伊兹育罗斯』。」祂对你的凝视带着令人毛骨悚然的笑意。
t_en: "Aren't you gonna join the fun, fake Akivili? Don't you want to listen to my ideas about the Astral Express and Tayzzyronth?" Aha stares at you with a chilling smirk.

t_ch: 「暂停：{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}已被搅入局内，我们应采取防护。逻辑：『繁育』的命途威胁到了『开拓』。结论：『开拓』的阿基维利可能参与其中。」
t_en: "Paused: {F#Miss}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME} is implicated. We should take precautions. Reason: The Path of Propagation has threatened Trailblaze. Conclusion: Akivili the Trailblaze might be involved."

t_ch: 「就这么暂停了？{NICKNAME}…螺丝咕姆为了你的安危把模拟宇宙暂停了。可惜，也不知这会阿哈有没有炸掉阿基维利的车。」黑塔不是很开心，「祂刚刚说的把戏是怎么回事？我们得检查下系统有没有受到影响，螺丝。」
t_en: "It paused just like that? {NICKNAME}... Screwllum has paused the Simulated Universe for your safety. It's a shame that we have no means to find out whether Aha has blown up Akivili's train at this time." Herta sounds disappointed. "What about the trick Aha mentioned? We need to check whether the system is affected, Screwy."

t_ch: 「提问：是否有与阿哈交流之概率？」你仍在原地，螺丝咕姆礼貌地开口，「无机；有机；星神；我赞美三者间思想的充分涌流与平等。」
t_en: "Question: Do you have a possibility to interact with Aha?" While you wait in place, Screwllum speaks in a polite tone, "I laud the equality and exchange of ideas among the organic lifeforms, inorganic lifeforms, and Aeons."

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}，还在等待星神回应？好无聊啊，玩个游戏吧。」黑塔嗤嗤地笑了，「你觉得谁最能跟阿哈合得来？」
t_en: "{NICKNAME}, are you still waiting for the Aeon's response? It's so boring. Let's play a game." Herta snickers. "Who do you think can get along with Aha the best?"

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆。
t_en: Screwllum.

t_ch: 「螺丝咕姆，他与阿哈交流的方式估计跟我们不大一样。你这么想也没错…」
t_en: "I suppose Screwllum doesn't communicate with Aha in the same way as we do. I can see where you come from..."

t_ch: 斯蒂芬•劳艾德。
t_en: Stephen Lloyd.

t_ch: 「这个小鬼！我总觉得他会用奇思妙想和阿哈混得很好，反正都不是常人能理解的东西。」
t_en: "That brat! I always think he can hit it off with Aha using his whimsical ideas. They aren't something normal people can understand anyways."

t_ch: 我！
t_en: Me!

t_ch: 「哦。」黑塔敷衍。
t_en: "Okay," Herta answers perfunctorily.

t_ch: 你继续在原地等待——你发誓你真的笑不出来。你的白眼快翻到天上时，祂——终于来了！祂一出现身边就刮起巨大的虚假数据风暴，祂要让你开开心心，你的白眼却翻到天上。…但你发现祂必须要你笑出来，你只好扯出一个咧嘴的虚伪笑容。
t_en: You continue to wait in place, and you swear you can't force out a laugh. Just as you are rolling your eyes, THEY finally arrived! A massive fake data storm erupts around THEM as soon as THEY appear. THEY are eager to make you happy, but all you can do is roll your eyes. Yet, when you notice THEY demand you to laugh, you have no choice but to stretch your mouth into a fake grin.

t_ch: 「嗨，阿基维利！你把那个球玩得不错♥。」阿哈开始夸赞你，「你是玩球高手，能告诉我是谁制作了这个球吗？噢…等等，祂要来了。让我们先让位于伟大的祂——鼓掌、敬礼吧！」
t_en: "Hi, Akivili! You play the ball well. ♥" Aha starts complimenting you, "Since you're an expert in playing the ball, could you tell me who made it? Oh, hold on. THEY are coming. Let us put our hands together and salute the great one!"

t_ch: 祂来了？你不知道阿哈是什么意思——盛大的巡礼却突然开启，一片喧嚣与欢闹，你却开始无声地尖叫。暖流撩拨着你，上万双眼睛于同一瞬间温柔地看着你，对你发出邀请。
t_en: THEY are coming? While you are still confused by what Aha said, a grand parade begins all of a sudden. Your surrounding turns boisterous and lively, but you start screaming in silence. A warm current stirs within you as tens of thousands of eyes gently gaze at you invitingly.

t_ch: 你相信祂的指间抹起彩虹色的水波——你的心绪被抚平，游走于拼图碎片、现代性的多重面孔与主义里，你相信祂已经抱住你，你也已成为意志集结的孩子！你有些迟疑，却又无法拒绝，甚至渴望更多地得到祂、拥抱祂……
t_en: You believe that rainbow-colored ripples stir to life between THEIR fingers. Your emotions are soothed as you navigate through the puzzle pieces and the multiple facets and ideologies of modernity. You believe you are in THEIR arms, and you have become one of the children of this united will! You hesitate slightly, yet you cannot resist, and even yearn for more of THEM and THEIR embrace...

t_ch: <color=#6f7cda>阿基维利</color> / <color=#ad5e68>开拓</color> 是你吗？我们以为你<color=#6f7cda>死了</color> / <color=#ad5e68>失踪了</color>。成千上万的<color=#6f7cda>命运</color> / <color=#ad5e68>历史</color>塑造了宇宙的<color=#6f7cda>长势</color> / <color=#ad5e68>走向</color>。我们几乎<color=#6f7cda>相信</color> / <color=#ad5e68>判断</color>你已成为它的<color=#6f7cda>养料</color> / <color=#ad5e68>注脚</color>。
t_en: <color=#6f7cda>Akivili</color> / <color=#ad5e68>The Trailblaze</color> Is that you? We thought you were <color=#6f7cda>dead</color> / <color=#ad5e68>missing</color>. Countless <color=#6f7cda>destinies</color> / <color=#ad5e68>histories</color> have shaped the universe's <color=#6f7cda>trajectory</color> / <color=#ad5e68>direction</color>. We nearly <color=#6f7cda>believed</color> / <color=#ad5e68>judged</color> that you had become its <color=#6f7cda>nourishment</color> / <color=#ad5e68>footnote</color>.

t_ch: <color=#6f7cda>希佩…！/</color><color=#ad5e68>你真的有</color><color=#6f7cda>/多副面孔</color>
t_en: <color=#6f7cda>Xipe...!/</color><color=#ad5e68>You do have</color><color=#6f7cda>/many faces</color>

t_ch: 谁还没点*多重*面孔？
t_en: Who doesn't?

t_ch: <color=#6f7cda>是我！/</color><color=#ad5e68>是你！/</color><color=#6f7cda>是祂！</color><color=#ad5e68>/是大家！</color>
t_en: <color=#6f7cda>It's me!/</color><color=#ad5e68>It's you!/</color><color=#6f7cda>It's THEM!</color><color=#ad5e68>/It's everyone!</color>

t_ch: 不，你是阿基维利！
t_en: No, you're Akivili!

t_ch: 「噢，集群星之母！」阿哈开始夸夸，祂的话却使你浑身不适，「只要你想做的事情足够好玩——哪怕是接力棒游戏！局势瞬息万变，上一次我们还在洽谈，下一次太一就变成了你。惋惜…我的老朋友！但祂使你看上去更*好*了。」
t_en: "Oh, the mother of all stars!" Aha starts the compliments, but the words make you uncomfortable. "As long as what you want to do is fun enough, even if it's a baton game! Changes happen rapidly. We were still negotiating last time, but this time, Ena already became you. It's a shame, my friend! But I must say Ena makes you look even better."

t_ch: 「好吧…停。『秩序』被『同谐』所同化，这我倒不意外。」黑塔摊手，「只是不知道发生在什么时候。莫非『秩序』的消失也和列神之战有关？唉，家族对此只字不提…我还挺想再见次太一，哪怕祂有点死板。噢，{NICKNAME}，要是让我转述这段八卦，我会这么说：希佩和阿哈还有你，为了塔伊兹育罗斯绞在了一起！」
t_en: "Okay... stop. I'm not surprised to see Order being assimilated by Harmony." Herta spreads her hands. "But I just don't know when it happened. Could the disappearance of the Order be related to the battle among Aeons? Ahhh, The Family doesn't say a single word about it... I'd really like to meet Ena again, although THEY are a bit rigid. Oh, {NICKNAME}, if I have to tell someone about this gossip, I'd say Xipe, Aha, and you have come together because of Tayzzyronth!"

t_ch: 你静待在原地，渴望觐见神的到来。但时间缓慢流逝…什么也没发生。你感觉自己的头发在脱落，生命在流逝…你的脑内开始浮现这样一种场景：由于祂的哺育，你稀疏的头发开始疯狂生长，缠绕住你的手腕与脚脖……你近乎得意地大笑起来。
t_en: You wait in place, eagerly hoping to meet the god. However, time goes by slowly, and nothing happens. You feel hair starting to fall, and your life is passing away... A scene pops up in your mind where your thinning hair starts growing wildly and becomes long enough to wrap around your wrists and ankles as a result of the Aeon's nurturing... You nearly laugh out loud in elation.

t_ch: 可惜！模拟宇宙使你的胡须生长，精神愈发颓靡——它们完全没长到该去的地方。
t_en: Unfortunately, the Simulated Universe makes your mustache grow and turns you into a disheveled person. The hair isn't growing where it is supposed to be.

t_ch: 「真是无聊。」黑塔百无聊赖地出现了，「要不聊点八卦怎么样？斯蒂芬•劳艾德是个怪人，你要是在模拟宇宙里遇到他，可能会看到个奇怪的中年人形象。」
t_en: "How boring." Herta shows up, looking bored. "How about we talk about gossip? Stephen Lloyd is a weirdo. If you run into him in the Simulated Universe, you might see him appear as a middle-aged guy."

t_ch: 我可以捉弄他吗？
t_en: Can I tease him?

t_ch: 「问我干嘛？」
t_en: "Why do you ask me?"

t_ch: 他是中年人吗？
t_en: Is he a middle-aged guy?

t_ch: 「不，斯蒂芬•劳艾德是个小鬼。一个会给自己洗澡用的小黄鸭也起名叫斯蒂芬•劳艾德的怪小鬼。」
t_en: "No, Stephen Lloyd is just a kid, one who names his Yellow Ducky showering toy the same name as him."

t_ch: 「反正，你假装不知道就行，别拆穿他，不然他可能会不高兴。」黑塔继续百无聊赖，「至于『丰饶』…别等了，祂大概不会出现。」
t_en: "Anyway, just pretend you don't know anything. He might be upset if you expose him." Still looking bored, Herta continues, "As for the Aeon of Abundance, I suggest you stop waiting, as THEY are unlikely to show up."

t_ch: 「否定：存在『丰饶』与『繁育』有关的可能。」螺丝咕姆突然出现。
t_en: "Negative: There are possible relations between Abundance and Propagation." Screwllum makes a sudden appearance.

t_ch: 「噢，对，有件好玩的事。我和螺丝咕姆下注了一份对赌协议。」黑塔撇了撇嘴，「螺丝咕姆认为『丰饶』的命途可能与塔伊兹育罗斯有关！我赌那会儿药师根本不存在。{NICKNAME}，赌吗？」
t_en: "Oh, by the way, there's something fun — Screwllum and I are in a betting agreement." Herta pursed her lips and adds. "Screwllum is of the view that the Path of Abundance might have been related to Tayzzyronth! As for me, I think Yaoshi didn't even exist at that time. {NICKNAME}, do you want to place a bet?"

t_ch: 赌！
t_en: Count me in!

t_ch: 「十分荣幸。」螺丝咕姆说，「这会是场有趣的游戏。」
t_en: "I'm honored. This is going to be interesting," says Screwllum.

t_ch: 还是算了吧。
t_en: Never mind.

t_ch: 「没什么好参与的。」少言寡语的阮•梅终于说了一句话。
t_en: "I don't see the point of the game." Ruan Mei, who is reticent, finally speaks.

t_ch: 「哼，拭目以待吧。」
t_en: "Hmph! Let's wait and see."

t_ch: 「结论：丰饶星神此时<color=#dbc291ff>尚未出现</color>。」螺丝咕姆机械齿轮般的声音响起，「依照约定，我会支付筹码给黑塔女士。」
t_en: "Conclusion: The Aeon of Abundance <color=#dbc291ff>didn't exist during this time period</color>." Screwllum's robotic gear-like voice comes. "As promised, I'll pay Madam Herta some chips."

t_ch: 你付的筹码是啥？
t_en: What kind of chips are you paying?

t_ch: 「筹码：螺丝。」螺丝咕姆回答，「黑塔女士称其渴望研究小螺丝的生命起源。补充：黑塔女士的赌注是空间站。」
t_en: "Chips: Screws." Screwllum answers, "Madam Herta said she wanted to study the origin of the life of small screws. Additional info: Madam Herta's bet is the space station."

t_ch: 我怀疑黑塔早就知道这件事…
t_en: I suspect that Herta already knew the answer...

t_ch: 「愿赌服输。」螺丝咕姆给出伟大的答案，「补充：黑塔女士的赌注是空间站。」
t_en: "I must honor the bet," Screwllum says righteously. "Additional info: Madam Herta's bet is the space station."

t_ch: ——祂真的尚未出现？你不知道，但你的心思开始散漫，螺丝咕姆的声音渐渐扭曲；你听到更多躁动的想法在你的脑中乱窜……
t_en: Has the Aeon really not appeared yet? You don't have the answer, but you are getting distracted. Screwllum's voice becomes distorted, and more chaotic thoughts are running amok in your mind...

t_ch: 你忽然感到麦穗缠绕你的肋骨，它们试图贯穿你的肉体，而溢出的痛苦又被莫名地愈合…许多命途行者的经历一一浮现，你处于一种永不止息、充满生命力的生态循环内部。而你睁开眼——发现自己身在一片城墙的外侧，在被偷走太阳的国度里，失去了神的信徒不再睡眠，他们将你的形象浇灌在壁画里。他们向你发问——他们向你求救！
t_en: Suddenly, you can feel ears of wheat wrapping around your ribs as they try to run your body through. Yet, the overflowing pain is somehow healed... One by one, the journeys of many Pathstriders surface, and you are located inside a perpetual and vibrant ecological cycle. You open your eyes to find yourself standing outside a fortress wall. In the nation where the Sun has been stolen, the believers who have lost their god will wake up from slumber. They include your portrait in the murals. They question you... they beseech you for help!

t_ch: 他们渴望你给予回答，渴望你从「开拓」中带来答案——他们的神去了哪里？现在你要给出回答…你就是那个救世者；你没有人可以依靠！你仿佛理解了药师的慈怀之心，你平心静气、深深呼吸，将从万千杂音中寻找到可回应的那一缕……
t_en: They long for you to give an answer, an answer you can bring from Trailblaze — Where did their god go? Now, you have to answer them. You are none other than the savior — having no one to rely on! You seem to understand Yaoshi's compassion now. You calm down and take a deep breath before searching for the one voice among many to which you can respond.

t_ch: …「秩序」消失了？
t_en: ...The Order disappeared?

t_ch: 「秩序」消失后，「均衡」将归还太阳；正如寰宇蝗灾褪去，虫群却从未断绝。
t_en: After the disappearance of the Order, the Equilibrium will return the Sun, just like how the Swarm never went extinct even after the Swarm Disaster has receded.

t_ch: …也许我还可以问问阮•梅。
t_en: ...Maybe I can ask Ruan Mei about it.

t_ch: 「古老的『均衡』星神，祂的决定不容质疑。」阮•梅陈述，「祂所做一切皆为『均衡』…如此夺目。」
t_en: "The decision of ancient Aeon of Equilibrium cannot be questioned." Ruan Mei states, "Everything THEY do is for the sake of Equilibrium... and that's magnificent."

t_ch: 别忘了你正扮演阿基维利，化作凡人藏在人群里是你最擅长的事情；不用担心，只需闭上眼睛——将四肢变得柔软、放松，你会惊觉自己的感官身处一片无限绚丽的画廊中央…接着，你迅速翻阅着变幻的画面……
t_en: Don't forget you're playing as Akivili. Turning into a mortal and hiding in the crowd is what you do best. Don't worry. Just close your eyes and relax your limbs, and you will find your senses in the middle of a gallery of a plethora of colors... Then, you start browsing the changing scenes quickly...

t_ch: 你睁开眼睛：你身处蠹星，这里没有人，只有虫群在你脚下匍匐爬行——你的直觉尖叫着，这必然是一切的开端！但你发现，古怪的、不合时宜的东西总是在模拟宇宙的漏洞里被推演出来——比如一份天才俱乐部#？会员关于<color=#dbc291ff>「终末」</color>的手稿研究，它自动在你面前展开。
t_en: You open your eyes and find yourself in Lepismat, where there's no humanity but a swarm of flat insects crawling at your feet. Your instinct screams at you, telling you that this is the beginning of everything! However, you realize that strange and anachronistic items constantly appear and are calculated into being from the loopholes in the Simulated Universe. For example, a manuscript copy of the research of <color=#dbc291ff>Finality</color> composed by Genius Society member #? has unfolded automatically before you.

t_ch: 你平心静气地观摩，知道其上有万物的结局。潦草痕迹记载：「…塔伊兹育罗斯，于仇恨与孤独中飞升的星神；自<color=#dbc291ff>『终末』</color>的呓语中得知，祂的死亡将注定祂的诞生。其一生都被囚禁于「繁育」的命途。如有兴趣，可在接下来的故事中观察其怪异、断带、被命运操弄之处…」
t_en: You calm down and observe it, knowing that the end of all things is recorded in it. The scribbling writes, "...Tayzzyronth, an Aeon that ascends amid hatred and loneliness. From the words <color=#dbc291ff>the Finality</color> mutters in THEIR sleep, Tayzzyronth's death predetermines THEIR birth. Throughout THEIR whole life, THEY will be imprisoned in the Path of Propagation. If you're interested, you can learn about its abnormality, its separation, and how it is played by fate..."

t_ch: 这一页手稿在你看完后自动燃烬，它进行了严格的自我销毁——下面还有一页更为潦草的手稿；你相信看完后它也会阅后即焚……
t_en: This page of the manuscript starts burning by itself after you finish reading it. It carries out a strict self-destruction procedure. The next page contains a handwriting that is even more messy. You believe it will burn after you read it, too...

t_ch: 某位天才，他在被波尔卡·卡卡目杀死前曾留下个人手稿，他的文风正如其谈吐般含糊：「一、一位厄兆先锋、听懂『终末』如倒放谜团般的呓语？…尔后他游走四方、只为四处告知…厄兆先锋的举动是否产生效果、无从知晓…」
t_en: A genius left behind a manuscript before being murdered by Polka Kakamond. His writing style is as vague as his speech: "A—An Omen Van—Vanguard successfully interpreted the somniloquy of the Finality, those words sounding like an enigma being played backwards? ...He then traveled around only to share his findings with others... Th—There are no means to find out... whether the Omen Vanguard's action was effectiv—ve..."

t_ch: 「该…该死的虚构口服药…说能治疗…因缺乏自信而引起的…口吃症…结果…连写作也…变成了…这样…」
t_en: "Th—That darn fictitious pills... It claimed... to be able to cure... stuttering disorder... caused by lack of self-confidence... Now... even my writing is... af—affected..."

t_ch: 你转着眼珠；突然间这份报告跳起来，对着你的脑袋来了一「拳」！你被打懵了！你还没反应过来时——它又躺在那里了。
t_en: As you look elsewhere, the manuscript suddenly jumps and gives your head a *punch*! You are dumbfounded! Before you know it, it is back to where it was lying again.

t_ch: 你怀疑刚刚是不是自己产生了幻觉。
t_en: You wonder whether you were hallucinating just now.

t_ch: 当你抬头察觉所处境地时——你发现自己已身处被隔绝的孤岛境地之中。这个岛国充满了椰林与洋流，居民身着最原始的皮毛。在被迫隔绝的大地上，你突然查觉这即是*命定之地*。「繁育」飞升为星神后，降临的第一个世界仿佛被提前选定：数琥珀纪前，此地因地理洋流迁徙而逐渐被隔绝，孤独浓稠地搅在一起，如同一把等待着播种的土壤。
t_en: When you look up, you find yourself on an isolated island with coconut trees and ocean currents. The inhabitants are dressed in animal hide in the most primitive form. Forced to live in isolation, it suddenly occurs to you that it is the *place of destiny*. The first world the Propagation descended upon after their ascension seemed to be predetermined. Several Amber Eras ago, this place was gradually isolated due to geographic and ocean current changes. Loneliness thickens, mixes, and stirs, and the island is like a handful of soil waiting to be sown.

t_ch: 你无事可做，面前的荒地上只有一团奇怪的火焰。你将彩色的火焰用海水扑灭，一个被烧得有些焦黑的相框摊在你的面前…旁边还有一把溺水小刀。
t_en: You have nothing to do, and there is only an odd-looking flame on the wasteland before you. You put out the colorful flame with seawater, and a rather charred photo frame emerges... There is a drowned knife next to it.

t_ch: 这照片有些古怪，一种不可违抗的恐惧叮叮铃铃地传来，你察觉命运如何抒写自我：曼德勒岛民在家人照片上的肩胛处画上彩色的翅膀，那种喷涌而出的彩色火焰就是生命的象征，他们用火焰互相连接、拥抱，最后孕育出新的生命。
t_en: There is something peculiar about this photograph that chimes an irresistible fear within you. As you gaze upon it, you detect how fate expresses itself: The Mandalan islanders draw on photos, creating colorful wings upon the image of their family members' shoulders. That multicolored flame erupting out is the representation of life itself. They connect and embrace each other with flames, culminating in the birth of new life.

t_ch: 曼德勒岛民正是用生命的诞育抵抗对孤独和死亡的恐惧——这片孤岛上除了爱与孤独外什么也没有…可悲的是这火焰终被浇灭，它们最终成为了虫群最初的温床。
t_en: The Mandalan islanders use the continuation of life to resist the fear of loneliness and death - there is nothing else on this isolated island except love and loneliness... Regrettably, this flame will eventually be extinguished, and the island will end up being the initial breeding ground for the Swarm.

t_ch: 一种饱含着毁灭欲望的火焰在你心中燃烧起来…你多么恐惧消亡！不可违抗的恐惧叮叮铃铃地传来，促使你做出了抢劫的判断——你控制不住举起的右手…
t_en: A ravenous desire for Destruction smolders in your heart... stoked by your overwhelming fear of annihilation! Your right hand rises uncontrollably as an irresistible fear tinkles through you and forces you to make a decision to commit robbery...

t_ch: 但你刚摸到这把刀，无数抚摸过这把刀具的灵魂就出现，又湮灭，故事涌入你的脑海。出于同一种恐惧，一位独臂的父亲曾用这把小刀保护自己的女儿；而最后在丢失村落的兵戈中，成年的女儿于虫潮中用这把刀进行了自我了断……
t_en: However, as you touch the knife, countless souls who once caressed this blade appear and dissipate, and stories flood into your mind. For, out of the same fear, a one-armed father once wielded this very knife to protect his daughter. And yet, amidst the warfare that destroyed their village, the grown daughter ended her own life amidst the Swarm...

t_ch: ——这片孤岛上除了爱与孤独外什么也没有…可悲的是它们最终成为了虫群最初的温床。
t_en: ...There is nothing else on this isolated island except love and loneliness... Regrettably, they will end up being the initial breeding ground for the Swarm.

t_ch: 反正没人能跳出来成为你的朋友…你打了个哈欠。
t_en: Anyone, no one will jump out and become your friend... You make a yawn.

t_ch: 在失去昼夜的宙斯忒赫特拉星，天空被虫潮遮蔽。众人本已放弃一切，而阴霾却突然消退——天亮了。宙斯忒赫特拉星自此开始了持续三个自然日的胜利怒号，你于半途加入其中，又与众人痛饮了十八个日夜，直到你终于反应过来——天似乎已亮了很久。
t_en: On planet Zeus Tehtera, where the distinction between day and night has long been blurred by the all-encompassing darkness wrought by the Swarm, the residents have already resigned themselves to their doomed fate. However, the shroud of darkness suddenly lifts — and the light of dawn breaks through. A triumphant and exultant celebration ensues, lasting for three full natural days and nights. You join in the revelry halfway through, imbibing to your heart's content with the jubilant crowd for eighteen days and nights, until a realization dawns upon you: The daylight has persisted for far too long.

t_ch: 你的目光落到废墟中央的石柜上——总有些愣头青还活在过去。
t_en: Your gaze falls upon a stone cabinet at the center of the ruins: Some stubborn souls are still clinging to the past.

t_ch: 你礼貌地敲了敲它。那之后，你又在它面前等了整整十一个自然月——
t_en: You politely knock on it and wait there for eleven whole natural months...

t_ch: 你终于忍无可忍，将一个光着身子的男人从石柜中拉出：「没有虫子了！别躲了！」
t_en: In the end, you lose your patience and pull a naked man out of the cabinet, shouting, "Stop hiding! The Swarm is no more!"

t_ch: 那一刻，惊人的哀嚎于眼泪中迸发，这位支援队的矿工抱着石柜哭了三天三夜，他那么伤心，就像他和它是一对被拆散的苦命鸳鸯。
t_en: At that moment, a heartrending wail erupts from this miner from the support team, who then clings to the stone cabinet and cries for three days and nights. His grief is so profound that he and the cabinet seem like a pair of bitter lovers forced apart.

t_ch: …活在过去也没什么不好。
t_en: ...There's nothing wrong with living in the past.

t_ch: 你对眼前突然出现的漆黑并不陌生…毕竟什么怪事都可能被你撞见，第一次或又一次…你面前出现了三个影子：那些存在过却又已湮灭的生灵偶尔会出现在这里，他们面容闪烁，有时又变成梅尔西耶兹养子般的虫类形象…或许他们有着不同的灵魂。
t_en: You are no stranger to the sudden darkness that envelopes you... for you have experienced too many inexplicable things, time and time again... This time, three shadows appear before you. Those who have once lived and perished may occasionally appear here. Their features flicker and waver, at times taking the form of insects resembling Melchiez's adopted sons... Perhaps they possess different souls.

t_ch: 「…『沙王』通过自我复制、分裂创造的恐怖军团，发源自蠹星系…部分虫群成为地面作战单位…以牺牲飞行能力为代价，获得了沉重的身躯与坚硬的甲壳…通常在虫群入侵中担任先锋，利用自身重量踏平大陆，突破防线…」
t_en: "The formidable army spawned by the self-replication and division of the Sand King originates from the Lepismat system. Some units of the Swarm have transformed into ground combat units... They have sacrificed flight for colossal size and hardened carapaces... These units often serve as the shock troops of the Swarm Invasion, using their massive bodies to break through defenses..."

t_ch: 你变得更加疯狂了！
t_en: You have become madder.

t_ch: 「我见到人类无法想象的奇观…我见到数十种不同的虫类缠绕，交合，而后诞生出全新的旁支；旁支再与旁支结合，恍若一朵变幻形态的玫瑰，花瓣相互耦合。虫群的繁衍恰似花朵散发出不同蜜味的信息素…丑陋与甜美相互堆叠…」
t_en: "I have seen wonders beyond the scope of human imagination... I have seen dozens of insects intertwine and give birth to entirely new offspring, which in turn weave themselves together like a shape-shifting rose with countless interlocking petals. The reproductive cycle of the Swarm is akin to a flower emitting pheromones and various scents... a breathtaking combination of monstrosity and beauty..."

t_ch: 理解别人的头脑总是十分困难…你开始困了。
t_en: Understanding someone else's thoughts is never an easy task... You are starting to get drowsy.

t_ch: 「蠹星曾经历物种繁盛的时期，此时虫族很可能存在多种生理性别——不同的生理性别在时代变迁中所承担的职能不一，在多基因分支中由哪几支承担生育功能也仍待探究；但不知何时、不知何故，古老的虫类物种似乎渐渐走向灭绝。」
t_en: "Lepismat was once a site of flourishing biodiversity, where insects of multiple biological sexes may have coexisted with each serving their own unique functions within the Swarm. However, it remains unclear which branches of the Swarm were responsible for reproduction during this era. However, at some point, the ancient insects gradually drifted toward the brink of extinction."

t_ch: 你更好奇他被谋命的理由…可惜他似乎并不关心自己。
t_en: You are more curious about why he was murdered... But unfortunately, it seems he doesn't care about himself.

t_ch: 在曼德勒岛上的医院，你的耳朵被聒噪的啼哭充斥…新生儿的数量达到有史以来的峰值；此后几日，它们冲出孤岛，于是大拉铂尔星各地的天空中都开始出现「虫潮」。
t_en: At the hospital on Mandalan Island, your ears are filled with raucous cries... The number of newborns has peaked at an all-time high. In the days that follow, they rushed out of the isolated island, and as a result, Swarms emerge in the skies all over Lapole Major.

t_ch: 你和医院的医生们一起撑了二十一天，直至大拉铂尔星宣布全球沦陷，请求星际支援；运输船到来时，你正扛着物资与第一批逃生者撤离，你听到一些与众不同的窃窃私语——他们正劝一个疯女人离开这里；她并不愿意开门，而她的窗户正在漏风。
t_en: You hold out with the doctors at the hospital for twenty-one days until the Lapole Major government officially announces the planet's fall and requests interstellar rescue.
